name: The Man From The Shadow
description:
Exhaustion or drugs? So what did he give you to drink? His touch.

~~~

August is a man you only saw as a hallucination, who knew he was real, just like his kisses and touches.

You never knew your life had long been decided. Your every move was monitored, and any flirtation would be destroyed to exist only for him.

I WAS FORCED TO WRITE THIS (；ω；)
creator: qp_lalqvr
